name: DigitalOcean Open Source Credits
description: Annual credit grants for open source projects tiered by GitHub stars, from $60/year (100+ stars) to $20,000/year (10,000+ stars), plus swag, co-marketing, and direct access to the open source team.

perks.title: Annual Infrastructure Credits
perks.description: Tiered credit grants based on GitHub stars: $60/year (100+ stars), $250/year (500+ stars), or $250–$20,000/year (10,000+ stars).

perks.title: Co-Marketing Opportunities
perks.description: Blog posts, live streams, social promotion, and participation in Hacktoberfest and other events.

perks.title: Direct Team Access
perks.description: Direct access to the DigitalOcean open source team, plus swag and exclusives.

eligibility: Active development and community around the project.
Must include DigitalOcean logo and link on your website or repository.
applicationProcess: Email opensource@digitalocean.com with your project details.
New applicants start at the Testing tier ($60/year).
Grants are awarded annually and must be renewed each year.
